put the property in even better
shape than it is at the present time.


''The Dixie Queen mill is at pres
ent running on ore from the On
tario property.


Sam Dillnger has charge of the
development of the Mckinley mine,
which has a very good showing.
They have struck an eight or nine
foot ledge, which, although a great
per cent is of very low grade, shows
streak of two or two and half
feet of very rich ore.


The Big Idaho company, a Chi
cago Incorporation, has purchased
large tracts of placer ground on
the Big creek between Dixie and
Buffalo Hump, which they are rap
idly developing. This company has
also taken option on a number of
quartz properties in that district,
some of which it is expected they
will buy outright"


Mr.. Simmons expects to return
to Dixie in q few DAYS.
